mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, inventory_id, order_no, asset_id, name, spec, model, original_value, dept_id, dept_name, storage_place, equipment_serial_no, category68_id, category68_name, manufacturer_name, need_reprint_label, print_count, last_print_time, print_status, check_status, check_time, check_by, real_storage_place, difference_remark, sort_order, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_inventory_item
mapper.select: where inventory_id = #{inventoryId} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by sort_order asc, create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_inventory_item (id, customer_id, inventory_id, order_no, asset_id, name, spec, model, original_value, dept_id, dept_name, storage_place, equipment_serial_no, category68_id, category68_name, manufacturer_name, need_reprint_label, print_count, print_status, check_status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{inventoryId}, #{orderNo}, #{assetId}, #{name}, #{spec}, #{model}, #{originalValue}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{storagePlace}, #{equipmentSerialNo}, #{category68Id}, #{category68Name}, #{manufacturerName}, #{needReprintLabel}, #{printCount}, #{printStatus}, #{checkStatus}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into sb_asset_inventory_item (id, customer_id, inventory_id, order_no, asset_id, name, spec, model, original_value, dept_id, dept_name, storage_place, equipment_serial_no, category68_id, category68_name, manufacturer_name, need_reprint_label, print_count, print_status, check_status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{tenantId}, #{item.inventoryId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.name}, #{item.spec}, #{item.model}, #{item.originalValue}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.deptName}, #{item.storagePlace}, #{item.equipmentSerialNo}, #{item.category68Id}, #{item.category68Name}, #{item.manufacturerName}, #{item.needReprintLabel}, #{item.printCount}, #{item.printStatus}, #{item.checkStatus}, #{item.sortOrder}, 0, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_inventory_item set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update sb_asset_inventory_item set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where inventory_id = #{inventoryId} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId}
